text:
Sessions for Leadership track

1 Tokenomics (60 Mins)
- Spend is Scaling Faster Than Value Realization
  - Tokenmaxing/ Rapid Growth of AI Token Spend
  - Lack of Visibility and Control
- Non-Decision-Grade Economics due to unclear cost and value dynamics and challenges in measuring AI benefits
- Shift from Token-Level to Workflow-Level Analysis

Participant profile
20-30 senior leaders:
- CEO, Presidents
- Product and Engineering heads (CIO, CTO, Head of R&D)
- Finance heads (CFO)

2 Agentic org of the future (60 mins)
- The shift towards newer, smaller team structure
- Implications on roles and responsibilities
  - At a team level
  - At the overall org level
- Challenges that need to be solved to ensure success:
  - HR processes, performance management, hiring, recruiting
  - Change management
  - Upskilling

Participant profile
20-30 senior leaders:
- CEO, Presidents
- Product and Engineering heads (CIO, CTO, Head of R&D)
- CHROs, Head of HR functions

Proposed format:
- Martin (or other partner) shares initial thoughts and content on the topic (15 min)
- Open for discussion and Q&A (45 mins)

Proposed timing - pls confirm:
- Tokenomics - 1-2 PM PT on July 1st
- Agentic org of the future - 3-4 PM PT on July 1st
ocr_reason: Dense agenda slide with multiple columns and small supporting text.
